globalNews.title: Iran accuses US of hitting civilian infrastructure
globalNews.summary: The US military says its attacks were intended to "further degrade Iranian military capabilities".

globalNews.title: Trump alleges China meddled in 2020 election and questions voting security ahead of midterms
globalNews.summary: China said Trump's claims were fabricated and US Democrats said he was paving the way to undermine November's elections.

globalNews.title: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?
globalNews.summary: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingyas have disappeared since leaving Myanmar on 29 June.

globalNews.title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
globalNews.summary: The law now allows the adoption of male distant relatives aged over 15 back into the imperial family.

globalNews.title: Philippines condemns monkey video on Chinese media as racist
globalNews.summary: The AI video on China Daily showed a monkey in Philippine garments singing its claims to the South China Sea.

cryptoNews.title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
cryptoNews.summary: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

cryptoNews.title: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval
cryptoNews.summary: SBI Holdings received regulatory approval to acquire a majority stake in Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako as it expands into stablecoins, onchain finance and tokenized assets.

cryptoNews.title: The British Virgin Islands are a top crypto hub no one ever talks about: Here’s why
cryptoNews.summary: Kraken, Bitstamp, 1inch and Bitfinex have all set up shop in the British Virgin Islands — but you might find it tricky to book an on-site meeting with one of their executives.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Dutch court declares crypto platform Knaken bankrupt over missing funds
cryptoNews.summary: The Rotterdam court said bankruptcy was necessary to ensure an orderly settlement because the company lacked enough assets to fully repay users.

aiNews.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
aiNews.summary: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

aiNews.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
aiNews.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from promp

aiNews.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
aiNews.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

aiNews.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
aiNews.summary: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

aiNews.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
aiNews.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward softwar
